untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calendar-specific logic (first five days of January vs. balance of month) and month-to-date P&L evaluation, which cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators and comparison operators. The rule also requires tracking intra-month direction confirmation and conditional regime switching based on monthly profitability—these require stateful logic and calendar awareness beyond the scope of indicator-based conditions.
translation_notes: This is a calendar-dependent, multi-timeframe strategy requiring: (1) detection of dominant direction in Jan 1-5, (2) confirmation of continuation through Jan 31, (3) month-to-date P&L evaluation, and (4) conditional year-long direction bias. The 7:1 up-to-down bias and pattern confirmation logic are not expressible with standard technical indicators alone. A custom regime detector or separate pre-processing step would be required.
